findings.title: wg.Add called inside the goroutine races with Wait
findings.description: Calling wg.Add(1) from within the spawned goroutine means the counter may not be incremented before wg.Wait() observes it, so Wait can return before tasks finish, and concurrent Add/Wait is itself unsafe.
findings.suggestion: Move wg.Add(1) to before the go statement so the counter is incremented on the parent goroutine prior to wg.Wait().
